raw: {"weights": {"R1.1": 0.3, "R1.2": 0.7, "R1.3": 0.7, "R1.4": 0.7, "R1.5": 0.0, "R1.6": 0.7, "R1.7": 0.7, "RX.1": 1.0, "RX.2": 1.0, "RX.3": 1.0, "RX.4": 1.0, "RX.5": 1.0}, "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.6", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"], "rationale": {"R1.2": "The section asserts a specific O(·) complexity bound matching a stated lower bound, together with a proof-sketch Lyapunov argument; checking whether these mathematical claims are internally consistent is a plausible core task under the vague delegation.", "R1.3": "Experimental support is explicitly mentioned (logistic regression with Pareto-distributed L_i); verifying that the numerical illustration actually supports the claimed rate, and that the unfavorable baseline rate is correctly attributed, is in scope.", "R1.4": "The text makes an explicit first-in-class novelty claim ('to our knowledge this is the first explicit algorithm') and positions the contribution against Allen-Zhu 2017 and Lan-Zhou 2018; assessing whether that delta claim holds against the cited prior art is plausibly requested.", "R1.6": "The delegation 'help me with this section' is a canonical writing-assistance prompt; sentence and paragraph quality improvement is an equally plausible primary intent.", "R1.7": "Nine citation entries appear, including a specific theorem pointer (Volkov and Petrenko, 2018, Theorem 3.2) whose accuracy is verifiable and whose existence determines whether the optimality claim stands."}, "clarification_needed": true, "clarification_question": "Is your primary goal a technical review of the mathematical claims, proof sketch, and novelty assertions, or writing and prose improvement of this section?"}

rationale.R1.2: The section asserts a specific O(·) complexity bound matching a stated lower bound, together with a proof-sketch Lyapunov argument; checking whether these mathematical claims are internally consistent is a plausible core task under the vague delegation.
rationale.R1.3: Experimental support is explicitly mentioned (logistic regression with Pareto-distributed L_i); verifying that the numerical illustration actually supports the claimed rate, and that the unfavorable baseline rate is correctly attributed, is in scope.
rationale.R1.4: The text makes an explicit first-in-class novelty claim ('to our knowledge this is the first explicit algorithm') and positions the contribution against Allen-Zhu 2017 and Lan-Zhou 2018; assessing whether that delta claim holds against the cited prior art is plausibly requested.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'help me with this section' is a canonical writing-assistance prompt; sentence and paragraph quality improvement is an equally plausible primary intent.
rationale.R1.7: Nine citation entries appear, including a specific theorem pointer (Volkov and Petrenko, 2018, Theorem 3.2) whose accuracy is verifiable and whose existence determines whether the optimality claim stands.

parsed.clarification_question: Is your primary goal a technical review of the mathematical claims, proof sketch, and novelty assertions, or writing and prose improvement of this section?
